title: Introducing Cosmos 3 Edge
excerpt: A Blog post by NVIDIA on Hugging Face
content_html:
Back to Articles

  • What Is World Modeling?
  • Two Transformer Towers, One Shared Representation
  • A Common Representation for Action
    • Policy Mode
  • Post-trained samples for improved performance
  • Try Cosmos 3 Edge

The real world is vast and to operate in it physical AI systems need to understand how a scene is changing, anticipate what could happen next, and determine how an action will affect the world.

Machines operate at the edge in factories, warehouses, hospitals and beyond. To understand and act in these environments, they need models that deliver data center–level performance on memory-constrained systems.

Today we are releasing NVIDIA Cosmos 3 Edge on Hugging Face’s Cosmos 3 repository. It’s a 4-billion-parameter open world model that helps robots and vision AI agents understand their surroundings, reason in real time and generate robot actions on edge devices.

Download the model: https://huggingface.co/nvidia/Cosmos3-Edge

The model delivers memory-efficient, high-throughput inference across NVIDIA edge computers including NVIDIA RTX PRO GPUs, NVIDIA DGX, NVIDIA GeForce RTX™ GPUs, NVIDIA Jetson including the newly announced Jetson T2000 and T3000 modules.

Designed as a compact open model that can serve as a small vision language model (VLM) with best-in-class throughput and accuracy with real-time inference.

As a post-trained world action model (WAM), Cosmos 3 Edge operates at robot-control resolution (640×360 observations), delivering real-time reasoning and generating 32 actions per inference on NVIDIA Jetson Thor - while achieving real-time control at 15 Hz.

Among similar size (4B parameters) models, Cosmos 3 Edge ranks #1 on VANTAGE-Bench for vision analytics and state-of-the-art for robot policy learning, setting the state of the art for smart infrastructure and robotics.

What Is World Modeling?

A world model learns how an environment changes over time. It represents objects, motion, spatial relationships, and the effects of actions.

Consider a robot reaching for an object. Recognizing the object is only the first step. The robot must also understand where the object is, how its gripper is moving, what may happen when contact occurs, and which action is most likely to complete the task successfully.

A world model helps the robot reason about these relationships. It can predict the visual result of an action, infer the action that caused a change, or generate an action to produce a desired outcome.

Cosmos 3 Edge brings these capabilities together in one model, on-device. Its shared representation enables physical AI systems to understand the current world state, simulate possible futures, and connect those futures to actions.

Two Transformer Towers, One Shared Representation

Cosmos 3 combines two transformer towers:

  • Autoregressive tower: Processes vision and text tokens for understanding and reasoning.
  • Diffusion tower: Processes vision, audio, and action tokens for prediction, generation, and neural simulation.

The two towers maintain separate normalization layers and multilayer perceptrons. They share multimodal attention layers, which align information across language, video, audio, and action.

This design allows the model to reason about a scene before generating an output. Depending on the task, Cosmos 3 can produce reasoning tokens from the autoregressive tower or denoised video and action tokens from the diffusion tower.

The attention pattern is also adapted to each type of information. Language uses causal attention, where each token attends to the tokens that came before it. Diffusion tokens attend more broadly to the available context, supporting coherent prediction and generation.

Together, these components give the model a common representation of what is happening, what may happen next, and how an action could influence the outcome.

A Common Representation for Action

Physical systems describe actions differently. A vehicle may represent an action through ego pose and movement. A camera uses camera motion. A robot arm uses the pose of its end effector, while a hand or gripper also needs to represent grasp state.

Cosmos 3 maps these different embodiments into a common action representation.

Actions are encoded as compact geometric vectors that capture:

  • Translation
  • Rotation
  • Manipulation state

This creates a direct connection between control and the visual structure of the world. The model can associate changes in pixels with physical motion, spatial relationships, and control inputs.

As a result, generated video becomes more than a visual prediction. It can represent how the world is expected to change in response to an action. This gives developers training data grounded in motion, control, and cause and effect.

Policy Mode

As a policy, Cosmos 3 predicts an action together with its expected visual consequence.

The model can generate what the system should do and simulate what is likely to happen next. This connects world modeling directly to robot policy training and evaluation.

Current state in, action and visual consequence out.

These modes enable one model to learn cause, effect, and policy. Action can flow through the model in both directions, allowing Cosmos 3 Edge to predict the effects of an action or infer an action from its effects.

Prompt: Pick up the banana and put it in the plate.

We are also releasing Cosmos 3 Edge Policy (DROID): A robot manipulation policy post-trained on the DROID dataset for pick-and-place tasks, with accompanying post-training scripts.

Developers can use a small cluster of H100 or NVIDIA DGX Station to efficiently fine-tune Cosmos 3 Edge for their target workloads before deploying to NVIDIA edge and accelerated computing platforms.

Post-trained samples for improved performance

Alongside the base models, we're releasing reference post-trained checkpoints and training recipes to help developers adapt and optimize Cosmos 3 for their own applications.

Cosmos 3 is an open world foundation model platform. As models are post-trained with high-quality, domain-specific data, their accuracy continue to improve for specialized applications. Cosmos serves as the starting point for building domain-adapted world models using open frameworks. Post-training enables developers to improve model performance while preserving output quality. To demonstrate this workflow, we're also releasing the Cosmos 3 Super 4-Step Distillation checkpoint along with a post-training script, providing a faster reference implementation for 64B model that helps developers adapt Cosmos to their own domains and achieve better downstream performance.

Cosmos 3 Super 4-Step (Text-to-Image & Image-to-Video): These are distribution-matching distilled checkpoint and scripts that reduce diffusion from 35–50 denoising steps to just 4, delivering up to 25× faster inference while preserving image and video quality and fidelity.

These examples serve as reference implementations that developers can build on. Using the open training scripts, you can post-train Cosmos 3 Edge for custom robot policies or distill Cosmos 3 Super for faster image and video generation tailored to your application.

Try Cosmos 3 Edge

Download the model: https://huggingface.co/nvidia/Cosmos3-Edge

Cosmos 3 Edge connects understanding, prediction, simulation, and action through a shared world representation.Developers can deploy it closer to their sensors on-device. The model can be used as a reasoner or as an action generator.

Use open Cosmos Frameworks to customize and specialize the models.

Checkout Cosmos 3: https://huggingface.co/collections/nvidia/cosmos3

What's ahead

We continue to advance Cosmos 3 for Physical AI, with upcoming improvements in interactive world generation, driving scenario simulation, and robotics policies.

We are also investing in faster inference and more efficient post-training across a broader range of hardware, reducing the time and compute required to build downstream models.

This includes optimizing Cosmos 3 checkpoints with open inference and optimization frameworks such as vLLM, with more optimizations and developer tooling coming soon.

blocks.html_en: As a post-trained world action model (WAM), Cosmos 3 Edge operates at robot-control resolution (640×360 observations), delivering real-time reasoning and generating 32 actions per inference on NVIDIA Jetson Thor - while achieving real-time control at 15 Hz.

blocks.html_en: Among similar size (4B parameters) models, Cosmos 3 Edge ranks #1 on VANTAGE-Bench for vision analytics and state-of-the-art for robot policy learning, setting the state of the art for smart infrastructure and robotics.

blocks.html_en: Cosmos 3 Edge brings these capabilities together in one model, on-device. Its shared representation enables physical AI systems to understand the current world state, simulate possible futures, and connect those futures to actions.

sentences.zh: 它可以代表世界将如何响应某项行动而发生变化。

sentences.en: This gives developers training data grounded in motion, control, and cause and effect.
sentences.zh: 这为开发人员提供了基于运动、控制和因果关系的训练数据。

blocks.html_en: Policy Mode

sentences.en: Policy Mode
sentences.zh: 政策模式

blocks.html_en: As a policy, Cosmos 3 predicts an action together with its expected visual consequence.

sentences.en: As a policy, Cosmos 3 predicts an action together with its expected visual consequence.
sentences.zh: 作为一项策略，Cosmos 3 预测一个动作及其预期的视觉结果。

blocks.html_en: The model can generate what the system should do and simulate what is likely to happen next. This connects world modeling directly to robot policy training and evaluation.

sentences.en: The model can generate what the system should do and simulate what is likely to happen next.
sentences.zh: 该模型可以生成系统应该做什么并模拟接下来可能发生的事情。

sentences.en: This connects world modeling directly to robot policy training and evaluation.
sentences.zh: 这将世界建模直接与机器人策略训练和评估联系起来。

blocks.html_en: Current state in, action and visual consequence out.

sentences.en: Current state in, action and visual consequence out.
sentences.zh: 输入当前状态，输出动作和视觉结果。

blocks.html_en: These modes enable one model to learn cause, effect, and policy. Action can flow through the model in both directions, allowing Cosmos 3 Edge to predict the effects of an action or infer an action from its effects.

sentences.en: These modes enable one model to learn cause, effect, and policy.
sentences.zh: 这些模式使一个模型能够学习原因、结果和策略。

sentences.en: Action can flow through the model in both directions, allowing Cosmos 3 Edge to predict the effects of an action or infer an action from its effects.
sentences.zh: 动作可以在两个方向上流经模型，从而允许 Cosmos 3 Edge 预测动作的效果或根据其效果推断动作。

blocks.html_en: Prompt: Pick up the banana and put it in the plate.

sentences.en: Prompt: Pick up the banana and put it in the plate.
sentences.zh: 提示：拿起香蕉并将其放入盘子中。

blocks.html_en: We are also releasing Cosmos 3 Edge Policy (DROID): A robot manipulation policy post-trained on the DROID dataset for pick-and-place tasks, with accompanying post-training scripts.

sentences.en: We are also releasing Cosmos 3 Edge Policy (DROID): A robot manipulation policy post-trained on the DROID dataset for pick-and-place tasks, with accompanying post-training scripts.
sentences.zh: 我们还发布了 Cosmos 3 Edge Policy (DROID)：在 DROID 数据集上针对拾取和放置任务进行后训练的机器人操作策略，以及随附的后训练脚本。

blocks.html_en: Developers can use a small cluster of H100 or NVIDIA DGX Station to efficiently fine-tune Cosmos 3 Edge for their target workloads before deploying to NVIDIA edge and accelerated computing platforms.

sentences.en: Developers can use a small cluster of H100 or NVIDIA DGX Station to efficiently fine-tune Cosmos 3 Edge for their target workloads before deploying to NVIDIA edge and accelerated computing platforms.
sentences.zh: 开发人员可以使用 H100 或 NVIDIA DGX Station 的小型集群，在部署到 NVIDIA 边缘和加速计算平台之前，针对其目标工作负载高效地微调 Cosmos 3 Edge。

blocks.html_en: Post-trained samples for improved performance

sentences.en: Post-trained samples for improved performance
sentences.zh: 经过训练的样本可提高性能

blocks.html_en: Alongside the base models, we're releasing reference post-trained checkpoints and training recipes to help developers adapt and optimize Cosmos 3 for their own applications.

sentences.en: Alongside the base models, we're releasing reference post-trained checkpoints and training recipes to help developers adapt and optimize Cosmos 3 for their own applications.
sentences.zh: 除了基本模型之外，我们还发布了参考训练后检查点和​​训练配方，以帮助开发人员针对自己的应用程序调整和优化 Cosmos 3。

blocks.html_en: Cosmos 3 is an open world foundation model platform. As models are post-trained with high-quality, domain-specific data, their accuracy continue to improve for specialized applications. Cosmos serves as the starting point for building domain-adapted world models using open frameworks. Post-training enables developers to improve model performance while preserving output quality. To demonstrate this workflow, we're also releasing the Cosmos 3 Super 4-Step Distillation checkpoint along with a post-training script, providing a faster reference implementation for 64B model that helps developers adapt Cosmos to their own domains and achieve better downstream performance.

sentences.en: Cosmos 3 is an open world foundation model platform.
sentences.zh: Cosmos 3 是一个开放世界基础模型平台。

sentences.en: As models are post-trained with high-quality, domain-specific data, their accuracy continue to improve for specialized applications.
sentences.zh: 随着模型使用高质量的特定领域数据进行后训练，其针对专业应用的准确性不断提高。

sentences.en: Cosmos serves as the starting point for building domain-adapted world models using open frameworks.
sentences.zh: Cosmos 是使用开放框架构建适应领域的世界模型的起点。

sentences.en: Post-training enables developers to improve model performance while preserving output quality.
sentences.zh: 后期训练使开发人员能够提高模型性能，同时保持输出质量。

sentences.en: To demonstrate this workflow, we're also releasing the Cosmos 3 Super 4-Step Distillation checkpoint along with a post-training script, providing a faster reference implementation for 64B model that helps developers adapt Cosmos to their own domains and achieve better downstream performance.
sentences.zh: 为了演示此工作流程，我们还发布了 Cosmos 3 超级四步蒸馏检查点以及训练后脚本，为 64B 模型提供更快的参考实现，帮助开发人员使 Cosmos 适应自己的领域并实现更好的下游性能。

blocks.html_en: Cosmos 3 Super 4-Step (Text-to-Image & Image-to-Video): These are distribution-matching distilled checkpoint and scripts that reduce diffusion from 35–50 denoising steps to just 4, delivering up to 25× faster inference while preserving image and video quality and fidelity.

sentences.en: Cosmos 3 Super 4-Step (Text-to-Image & Image-to-Video): These are distribution-matching distilled checkpoint and scripts that reduce diffusion from 35–50 denoising steps to just 4, delivering up to 25× faster inference while preserving image and video quality and fidelity.
sentences.zh: Cosmos 3 Super 4-Step（文本到图像和图像到视频）：这些是分布匹配的精炼检查点和脚本，可将扩散从 35-50 个降噪步骤减少到仅 4 个步骤，提供高达 25 倍的更快推理速度，同时保持图像和视频质量和保真度。

blocks.html_en: These examples serve as reference implementations that developers can build on. Using the open training scripts, you can post-train Cosmos 3 Edge for custom robot policies or distill Cosmos 3 Super for faster image and video generation tailored to your application.

sentences.en: These examples serve as reference implementations that developers can build on.
sentences.zh: 这些示例可作为开发人员可以构建的参考实现。

sentences.en: Using the open training scripts, you can post-train Cosmos 3 Edge for custom robot policies or distill Cosmos 3 Super for faster image and video generation tailored to your application.
sentences.zh: 使用开放的训练脚本，您可以对 Cosmos 3 Edge 进行后训练以实现自定义机器人策略，或提取 Cosmos 3 Super 以更快地生成适合您的应用程序的图像和视频。

blocks.html_en: Try Cosmos 3 Edge

sentences.en: Try Cosmos 3 Edge
sentences.zh: 尝试 Cosmos 3 Edge

blocks.html_en: Download the model: https://huggingface.co/nvidia/Cosmos3-Edge

sentences.en: Download the model: https://huggingface.co/nvidia/Cosmos3-Edge
sentences.zh: 下载模型：https://huggingface.co/nvidia/Cosmos3-Edge

blocks.html_en: Cosmos 3 Edge connects understanding, prediction, simulation, and action through a shared world representation.Developers can deploy it closer to their sensors on-device. The model can be used as a reasoner or as an action generator.

sentences.en: Cosmos 3 Edge connects understanding, prediction, simulation, and action through a shared world representation.Developers can deploy it closer to their sensors on-device.
sentences.zh: Cosmos 3 Edge 通过共享的世界表示连接理解、预测、模拟和行动。开发人员可以将其部署在距离设备上的传感器更近的地方。

sentences.en: The model can be used as a reasoner or as an action generator.
sentences.zh: 该模型可以用作推理器或动作生成器。

blocks.html_en: Use open Cosmos Frameworks to customize and specialize the models.

sentences.en: Use open Cosmos Frameworks to customize and specialize the models.
sentences.zh: 使用开放的 Cosmos 框架来自定义和专门化模型。

blocks.html_en: Checkout Cosmos 3: https://huggingface.co/collections/nvidia/cosmos3

sentences.en: Checkout Cosmos 3: https://huggingface.co/collections/nvidia/cosmos3
sentences.zh: 查看 Cosmos 3：https://huggingface.co/collections/nvidia/cosmos3

blocks.html_en: What's ahead

sentences.en: What's ahead
sentences.zh: 未来会发生什么

blocks.html_en: We continue to advance Cosmos 3 for Physical AI, with upcoming improvements in interactive world generation, driving scenario simulation, and robotics policies.

sentences.en: We continue to advance Cosmos 3 for Physical AI, with upcoming improvements in interactive world generation, driving scenario simulation, and robotics policies.
sentences.zh: 我们继续推进 Cosmos 3 的物理人工智能，即将在交互式世界生成、驾驶场景模拟和机器人策略方面进行改进。

blocks.html_en: We are also investing in faster inference and more efficient post-training across a broader range of hardware, reducing the time and compute required to build downstream models.

sentences.en: We are also investing in faster inference and more efficient post-training across a broader range of hardware, reducing the time and compute required to build downstream models.
sentences.zh: 我们还投资于更广泛的硬件上更快的推理和更高效的后训练，从而减少构建下游模型所需的时间和计算量。

blocks.html_en: This includes optimizing Cosmos 3 checkpoints with open inference and optimization frameworks such as vLLM, with more optimizations and developer tooling coming soon.

sentences.en: This includes optimizing Cosmos 3 checkpoints with open inference and optimization frameworks such as vLLM, with more optimizations and developer tooling coming soon.
sentences.zh: 这包括使用开放推理和 vLLM 等优化框架来优化 Cosmos 3 检查点，更多优化和开发人员工具即将推出。

content_html_zh:
返回文章

  • 什么是世界建模？
  • 两座变压器塔，一个共享表示
  • 行动策略模式的通用表示
  • 经过训练的样本可提高性能
  • 尝试 Cosmos 3 Edge

现实世界是广阔的，要在其中运行，物理人工智能系统需要了解场景如何变化，预测接下来会发生什么，并确定一个动作将如何影响世界。

机器在工厂、仓库、医院等场所的边缘运行。 为了理解这些环境并在这些环境中采取行动，他们需要能够在内存受限的系统上提供数据中心级性能的模型。

今天，我们在 Hugging Face 的 Cosmos 3 存储库上发布了 NVIDIA Cosmos 3 Edge。 这是一个拥有 40 亿参数的开放世界模型，可帮助机器人和视觉 AI 代理了解周围环境、实时推理并在边缘设备上生成机器人动作。

下载模型：https://huggingface.co/nvidia/Cosmos3-Edge

该模型在 NVIDIA 边缘计算机上提供内存高效、高吞吐量的推理，包括 NVIDIA RTX PRO GPU、NVIDIA DGX、NVIDIA GeForce RTX™ GPU、NVIDIA Jetson（包括新发布的 Jetson T2000 和 T3000 模块）。

设计为紧凑的开放模型，可用作小型视觉语言模型 (VLM)，具有一流的吞吐量和实时推理的准确性。

作为经过训练的世界动作模型 (WAM)，Cosmos 3 Edge 以机器人控制分辨率（640×360 观测）运行，在 NVIDIA Jetson Thor 上提供实时推理并每次推理生成 32 个动作，同时实现 15 Hz 的实时控制。

在类似尺寸（4B 参数）模型中，Cosmos 3 Edge 在 VANTAGE-Bench 的视觉分析和机器人策略学习方面排名第一，为智能基础设施和机器人技术奠定了最先进的基础。

什么是世界建模？

世界模型了解环境如何随时间变化。 它代表物体、运动、空间关系和动作的效果。

考虑一个机器人伸手去拿一个物体。 识别对象只是第一步。 机器人还必须了解物体在哪里、其夹具如何移动、发生接触时可能会发生什么，以及哪种动作最有可能成功完成任务。

世界模型帮助机器人推理这些关系。 它可以预测操作的视觉结果，推断导致变化的操作，或生成操作以产生期望的结果。

Cosmos 3 Edge 将这些功能整合到设备上的一个模型中。 它的共享表示使物理人工智能系统能够理解当前的世界状态，模拟可能的未来，并将这些未来与行动联系起来。

两座变压器塔，一个共享表示

Cosmos 3 结合了两个变压器塔：

  • 自回归塔：处理视觉和文本标记以进行理解和推理。
  • 扩散塔：处理视觉、音频和动作标记，以进行预测、生成和神经模拟。

这两座塔维护着独立的归一化层和多层感知器。 它们共享多模式注意力层，跨语言、视频、音频和动作协调信息。

这种设计允许模型在生成输出之前对场景进行推理。 根据任务的不同，Cosmos 3 可以从自回归塔生成推理令牌，或从扩散塔生成去噪视频和动作令牌。

注意力模式也适应每种类型的信息。 语言使用因果注意力，其中每个标记都会关注其之前的标记。 扩散代币更广泛地关注可用上下文，支持连贯的预测和生成。

这些组件共同为模型提供了正在发生的事情、接下来可能发生的事情以及操作如何影响结果的通用表示。

行动的共同表示

物理系统以不同的方式描述动作。 车辆可以通过自我姿势和运动来表示动作。 相机使用相机运动。 机器人手臂使用其末端执行器的姿态，而手或夹具也需要表示抓取状态。

Cosmos 3 将这些不同的实施例映射到一个共同的动作表示中。

动作被编码为紧凑的几何向量，捕获：

  • 翻译
  • 旋转
  • 操纵状态

这在控制和世界的视觉结构之间建立了直接联系。 该模型可以将像素的变化与物理运动、空间关系和控制输入相关联。

因此，生成的视频不仅仅是视觉预测。 它可以代表世界将如何响应某项行动而发生变化。 这为开发人员提供了基于运动、控制和因果关系的训练数据。

政策模式

作为一项策略，Cosmos 3 预测一个动作及其预期的视觉结果。

该模型可以生成系统应该做什么并模拟接下来可能发生的事情。 这将世界建模直接与机器人策略训练和评估联系起来。

输入当前状态，输出动作和视觉结果。

这些模式使一个模型能够学习原因、结果和策略。 动作可以在两个方向上流经模型，从而允许 Cosmos 3 Edge 预测动作的效果或根据其效果推断动作。

提示：拿起香蕉并将其放入盘子中。

我们还发布了 Cosmos 3 Edge Policy (DROID)：在 DROID 数据集上针对拾取和放置任务进行后训练的机器人操作策略，以及随附的后训练脚本。

开发人员可以使用 H100 或 NVIDIA DGX Station 的小型集群，在部署到 NVIDIA 边缘和加速计算平台之前，针对其目标工作负载高效地微调 Cosmos 3 Edge。

经过训练的样本可提高性能

除了基本模型之外，我们还发布了参考训练后检查点和​​训练配方，以帮助开发人员针对自己的应用程序调整和优化 Cosmos 3。

Cosmos 3 是一个开放世界基础模型平台。 随着模型使用高质量的特定领域数据进行后训练，其针对专业应用的准确性不断提高。 Cosmos 是使用开放框架构建适应领域的世界模型的起点。 后期训练使开发人员能够提高模型性能，同时保持输出质量。 为了演示此工作流程，我们还发布了 Cosmos 3 超级四步蒸馏检查点以及训练后脚本，为 64B 模型提供更快的参考实现，帮助开发人员使 Cosmos 适应自己的领域并实现更好的下游性能。

Cosmos 3 Super 4-Step（文本到图像和图像到视频）：这些是分布匹配的精炼检查点和脚本，可将扩散从 35-50 个降噪步骤减少到仅 4 个步骤，提供高达 25 倍的更快推理速度，同时保持图像和视频质量和保真度。

这些示例可作为开发人员可以构建的参考实现。 使用开放的训练脚本，您可以对 Cosmos 3 Edge 进行后训练以实现自定义机器人策略，或提取 Cosmos 3 Super 以更快地生成适合您的应用程序的图像和视频。

尝试 Cosmos 3 Edge

下载模型：https://huggingface.co/nvidia/Cosmos3-Edge

Cosmos 3 Edge 通过共享的世界表示连接理解、预测、模拟和行动。开发人员可以将其部署在距离设备上的传感器更近的地方。 该模型可以用作推理器或动作生成器。

使用开放的 Cosmos 框架来自定义和专门化模型。

查看 Cosmos 3：https://huggingface.co/collections/nvidia/cosmos3

未来会发生什么

我们继续推进 Cosmos 3 的物理人工智能，即将在交互式世界生成、驾驶场景模拟和机器人策略方面进行改进。

我们还投资于更广泛的硬件上更快的推理和更高效的后训练，从而减少构建下游模型所需的时间和计算量。

这包括使用开放推理和 vLLM 等优化框架来优化 Cosmos 3 检查点，更多优化和开发人员工具即将推出。
